Notice And Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Dec-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT VALUE PLUMBING CO.'s Motion To Transfer Venue is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing.

Transfer fees to be paid by the moving party.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
